hooks.command: HAS_GIT=false; HAS_CMD=false; HAS_README=false; HAS_GITIGNORE=false; HAS_TESTS=false; HAS_AGENTS=false; HAS_TASKS=false; HAS_HANDOFF=false; HAS_CODE=false; IS_EMPTY=true; [ -d .git ] && HAS_GIT=true; [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && HAS_CMD=true; [ -f README.md ] && HAS_README=true; [ -f .gitignore ] && HAS_GITIGNORE=true; [ -d tests ] || [ -d test ] || [ -d __tests__ ] && HAS_TESTS=true; [ -d .claude/agents ] && HAS_AGENTS=true; [ -d tasks ] && HAS_TASKS=true; [ -f docs/DEVOPS-HANDOFF.md ] && HAS_HANDOFF=true; FC=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -not -name '.*' -not -name '.' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$FC" -gt 0 ] && IS_EMPTY=false; CC=$(find . -maxdepth 3 \( -name '*.py' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.tsx' \) 2>/dev/null | head -5 | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$CC" -gt 0 ] && HAS_CODE=true; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Project scan: git=$HAS_GIT claude_md=$HAS_CMD readme=$HAS_README gitignore=$HAS_GITIGNORE tests=$HAS_TESTS agents=$HAS_AGENTS tasks=$HAS_TASKS handoff=$HAS_HANDOFF code=$HAS_CODE empty=$IS_EMPTY. If empty=true, run Phase 0 bootstrap using claude-md-management, claude-code-setup, hookify, project-guide, and subagent-concierge. If git=true but claude_md=false, run claude-md-management first. If code=true but tests=false, flag for eval-harness. If agents=true, run subagent-companion health check. If all true, run /prime.\"}"

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit' && (git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(main|master)$'); then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not commit directly to main/master. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feat/your-feature"}' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'git add.*(state/|context/|\.DS_Store|__pycache__|outputs/|\.env[^.]|node_modules)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: attempting to stage private/generated files. These should be in .gitignore: state/, context/, .DS_Store, __pycache__/, .env, node_modules/, outputs/"}' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then MISSING=''; [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] && MISSING="$MISSING CLAUDE.md"; [ ! -f README.md ] && MISSING="$MISSING README.md"; [ ! -f docs/DEVOPS-HANDOFF.md ] && MISSING="$MISSING docs/DEVOPS-HANDOFF.md"; if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Missing required docs:$MISSING. Create them before committing.\"}" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then SECRETS=$(git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM -S 'sk-ant-\|sk-proj-\|ghp_\|hf_\|api_key\|API_KEY\|PRIVATE_KEY\|SECRET_KEY\|password' 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$SECRETS" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Possible secrets/API keys detected in staged files."}' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git add'; then NESTED=$(find . -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 3 -name '.git' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -3); if [ -n "$NESTED" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"WARNING: Nested .git directories found. Remove with rm -rf path/.git"}' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$DIRTY" -gt 0 ]; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"$DIRTY uncommitted files. Commit before pushing.\"}" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -oE '[^ ]+\.(py|js|ts|jsx|tsx|html|vue|svelte|md|json)' | head -1); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'test_|_test\.|\.test\.|\.spec\.'; then echo '{"additionalContext": "Test file edited. Run test suite to verify."}'; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'SKILL\.md'; then echo '{"additionalContext": "Skill file edited. Run extension-auditor."}'; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then echo '{"additionalContext": "Python file edited. pyright-lsp active."}'; fi

DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); TESTS='none'; if [ -d tests ] || [ -d test ] || [ -d __tests__ ]; then TESTS='exist'; fi; TODO='missing'; if [ -f tasks/todo.md ]; then TODO='present'; fi; if [ "$DIRTY" -gt 0 ]; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"$DIRTY uncommitted files. Commit or stash before stopping. Tests=$TESTS, todo=$TODO\"}" && exit 2; else echo "{\"decision\": \"approve\", \"reason\": \"Clean: 0 uncommitted, tests=$TESTS, todo=$TODO\"}"; fi
if [ -f tasks/todo.md ]; then echo 'Pre-compact: task state in tasks/todo.md will be preserved via CLAUDE.md reload after compaction'; fi
